arts.ttl: I was at Finch Farm on day it started to feel like Everton's luck might finally be about to improve
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas reports from Finch Farm, where he present in the aftermath of a new takeover deal and with a star player on the cusp of a return

arts.ttl: Everton fans' biggest fears may come true even after takeover announcement
arts.sum: The proposed takeover by Texas-based Friedkin Group is back on, it was announced, giving hope to the club’s long-suffering fans that more stable times lie ahead after such a turbulent period in its history. There was good news for storied English club Everton this week regarding the long-running saga over its ownership .

arts.ttl: Palace fans bring red and blue to Chicago fan festival
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's match against Manchester United was the star attraction at the latest Premier League Mornings Live fan festival, which took place in Chicago last weekend – and the Eagles were certainly backed by a sizeable crowd Stateside.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche responds to Dan Friedkin's takeover and what it means for him and Everton
arts.sum: Dan Friedkin has agreed to buy Farhad Moshiri's 94.1 per cent stake in Everton and Sean Dyche has given his thoughts on the deal for the first time
